posts.author: NorthbridgeUpdates42
posts.text: Reminder: The Northbridge Library is hosting its annual summer reading event next Saturday. Doors open at 9am for kids' story time, followed by adult discussion groups. Free entry! #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This post contains only harmless public information about a community event and does not violate any policies.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.
